revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-495

Beverage antenna

A horizontal travelling wave directional antenna, usually long in relation to the wavelength, connected to the radio equipment at one end and connected to ground at the other through an impedance equal to the characteristic impedance. Its proper performance depends upon the wave tilt and is therefore most effective when erected over ground of low conductivity.

{{IALAFooter}}
